## Active Standards

### Profile: [PROFILE_NAME]

[One-line description of what this profile enforces.]

Active rule categories:
- [x] Security (EscapeOutput, NonceVerification, ValidatedSanitizedInput, SafeRedirect)
- [x] DB (PreparedSQL, DirectDatabaseQuery, SlowDBQuery)
- [x] NamingConventions (PrefixAllGlobals, ValidFunctionName, ValidHookName)
- [x] WP (DeprecatedFunctions, Capabilities, I18n, AlternativeFunctions)
- [x] PHP (YodaConditions, StrictInArray, NoSilencedErrors, DontExtract)
- [ ] Docs (wordpress-docs profile only)
- [ ] VIP (wordpress-vip profile only)

## Governance

This constitution is the authoritative source for all `wp-coding-standards` reviews in this project.

- Run `/speckit.wp-coding-standards.init` to update this configuration.
- Run `/speckit.wp-coding-standards.review` to check compliance.
- All deviations must be documented in the **Documented Deviations** section above.

**Amendment procedure:**
1. Update this file with the new setting or documented deviation
2. Run `/speckit.wp-coding-standards.review` to verify the change is reflected correctly
3. Commit with: `chore: update wp-standards-constitution — [summary]`
